global.description: The ad features a vibrant background with bold text and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a weekend getaway with hotel and flight deals.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A simple geometric shape consisting of an oval and a square, both in a muted color.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: Another geometric shape that complements the first, maintaining a cohesive design.

elements.label: Weekend escape offer
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Escape this weekend Hotels + flights in one tap' prominently displayed at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Hotels + flights in one tap

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: A striking banner at the top with the text 'NomadLayer SALE' in a contrasting color to grab attention.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A bright button with the text 'Book now' designed to stand out and encourage user interaction.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is positioned at the top, the body text is centered at the bottom, and the CTA is located just below the body text.
